title: pxPassport
body:
![pxPassport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pNO5ccyP/images/b6abee12e0b4e756e941268f144b88fbba05fdd0.png)

**pxPassport** adds an interactive passport system with intuitive controls.  
Designed for **RolePlay projects**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 📄 Personal player passports with database support  
- 🎨 Graphical user interface (GUI)  
- 🎨 Modern MiniMessage formatting  
- 🧩 Text overlay on GUI elements  

---

## 🔗 Dependencies

The following dependencies are required for proper plugin operation:

| Dependency | Required | Description |
|------------|----------|-------------|
| **Paper** / **Folia** | ✅ | Only Paper-based cores are supported. Also works on Folia |
| **PlaceholderAPI** | ✅ | Used for placeholders inside the plugin |
| **MySQL** | ❌ | Cross-server access to player data |

---

## 🧾 Commands and Permissions

### Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|-------|-------------|------------|
| `/passport view` | View your own passport | pxpassport.view.own |
| `/passport view <Nickname>` | Send a request to view another player’s passport | pxpassport.view.other |
| `/passport give <Nickname>` | Give a passport to a player | pxpassport.give |
| `/passport delete <Nickname>` | Delete a player’s passport | pxpassport.delete |
| `/passport reload` | Reload the configuration | pxpassport.reload |

---

## 📚 Documentation

Detailed documentation with configuration examples and a full feature description:

👉 **https://nekorise.gitbook.io/pxpassport/**

---

## 🎨 Resource Pack

A resource pack is **required** for some GUI variants to display correctly.  
You can download a demo resource pack for the `example-rp.yml` menu:

⬇ **Download the resource pack:**  
https://github.com/Nek0rise/pxPassport/releases

---

## 🛠 Support

If you find a bug or want to suggest an idea, please create an issue in the project repository.
